name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 25 Oct 2018
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Release Version","bold":true},{"text":": 6.27"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The latest version of Neto is being released and rolling out to your control panel automatically."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This release sees some new integrations in the addon store."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Rejoiner","bold":true},{"text":" - Abandoned cart email marketing."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"https://www.netohq.com/support/s/article/Rejoiner"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Fomo","bold":true},{"text":" - Sales and user action site notifications."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"https://www.netohq.com/support/s/article/Fomo"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"touchSMS","bold":true},{"text":" - Automated SMS order notifications."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"https://www.netohq.com/support/s/article/touchSMS"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"If you're giving any of them a try we'd love to hear your experiences!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
